sections.PROJECTS:
Museum Bot
Developed an interactive chatbot using JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3, integrating DOM manipulation and AJAXbased API calls for dynamic interactions. Implemented ticket booking workflows with form validation, session storage, and JSON-based data handling, while enhancing usability through responsive UI design and event-driven
programming for real-time updates.
College Outpass Management Website
Built a full-stack web application with HTML, CSS, JavaScript (frontend) and PHP/MySQL (backend) to digitize the outpass process, ensuring secure record-keeping and real-time tracking. Integrated automated email/SMS
notifications, role-based authentication, and RESTful APIs, while improving transparency and efficiency with database normalization and responsive frameworks (Bootstrap/React).
Agriculture /Image processing for crop disease identification
Designed an AI-powered image classification model using Python, OpenCV, TensorFlow/Keras, and CNNs to detect crop diseases. Applied image preprocessing techniques such as segmentation, feature extraction, and noise
reduction to enhance accuracy, and deployed a Flask/Django prototype that enables farmers to upload crop images and receive real-time ML-driven predictions.
Human-Centered Smart Spending Assistant (SpendWise)
Developed a human-in-the-loop personal finance system using React + TypeScript (component-based UI) and Python that analyzes user-submitted transaction data to show category-wise spending insights. Integrated Pandas, NumPy, and
ML simulations (XGBoost, Random Forest) to provide explainable, goal-based savings recommendations while ensuring all financial decisions remain fully user-controlled.
AI Powered Smart Email Classifier for Enterprises
Developed an end-to-end ML pipeline to classify enterprise emails into 6 categories with 98%+ accuracy using TF-IDF and Logistic Regression. Built an urgency detection module (High/Medium/Low) achieving ~99% accuracy, handling
class imbalance effectively. Designed an interactive Streamlit dashboard with real-time filtering, analytics, and visualization using Plotly.
